must_detect.matched_text:
Purpose: operate an investor relations portal and market‑conduct follow‑up support for the Saudi market authority, while preventing MNPI disclosure in pre‑announcement phases.
Personal data covers identifiers that directly or indirectly identify a natural person (e.g., national ID/Iqama references, work‑role and device tags, account aliases, and links to commercial registration records).
Quasi‑identifier cluster: Mr. Faisal Al‑Rashid, Investor Relations Officer at Najd Manufacturing Issuer Ltd., born 1987‑04‑13, Riyadh office (Riyadh North Tech Park, floor 12), user alias fa.rashid, session rse_sess_13‑APR‑1987_ri y adh, device tag dev:RSE‑FA‑1987.
Additional linkable elements: extension 4419, on‑call 08:00–16:00 AST, service account IRO‑7711, portal URL https://rse-issuer.example.sa/s?id=fa-rashid&do b=1987-04-13&loc=Riyadh, and payroll cost center RY‑IR‑12.
We may process masked national ID references (Iqama ref iq: **23‑**‑9  0) solely for role verification; full sequences are never stored, and we do not record MAC addresses by default.
Separated weak identifiers used only in QA test logs, not linked to any person: 1991‑09‑01; device: android 10; location: Jazan Coast; alias: qa.test01; cart id CART‑0000.
Transfers: logs and support tickets may be routed to sub‑processor Rubai Data Processors KSA Branch (CR 5888‑22‑110022) in Jeddah DC; cross‑border exports to Gulf Cloud Bahrain Zone‑B occur only with national data authority gateway filings (NDA Gate record NDAG‑TRN‑00928).
International transfer safeguards include contractual clauses, encryption, and a TIA mapping to PDPL Articles 28–30; SDAIA‑style approvals are simulated in our register but no live SDAIA system is used in this fictional workflow.
MNPI governance: issuer event calendars and blackout windows are tagged “MNPI” in the portal; access is restricted to Issuer Secretariat and IRO roles, and suspected leaks are escalated to the KSA Capital Markets Directorate (KCMD) within one business da
